response.original_title: Extra Innings: The Real Story Behind the Bright Lights of Summer
response.overview: They gave everything to the game, and the game gave them everything. Extra Innings: The Real Story Behind The Bright Lights of Summer, is a stunning, feature-length film that chronicles the real-life story of National Softball Hall-of-Famer, Dot Wilkinson and the heyday of women's softball.
response.title: Extra Innings: The Real Story Behind the Bright Lights of Summer
